semantic_description: Read-only array scan that counts adjacent increasing steps. The function receives nonnegative n and an IntArray-backed list l of length n, initializes cnt to 0, then runs a for loop over indices i with guard i + 1 < n. On each iteration it compares a[i] and a[i + 1], increments cnt exactly when the adjacent pair is strictly increasing, preserves the input array unchanged, and returns the Coq recursive specification array_count_increasing_steps_spec(l). For n <= 1 the loop is skipped and the result is 0.
